Second additional CPP contribution rates and maximums

The following table shows the second additional CPP (CPP2) contribution rates and Year's Additional Maximum Pensionable Earnings (YAMPE).

Second additional CPP contribution rates and YAMPE
Year Year's additional maximum pensionable earnings Definition (YAMPE) Employee and employer contribution rate (%) Maximum annual employee and employer contribution
2026 $85,000 4.00 $416.00
2025 $81,900 4.00 $416.00
2024 $73,200 4.00 $188.00
